# Nimbus Components

> Full specifications for all 12 components. Grouped by workflow.
> For tokens see [design.md](design.md). For rules & accessibility see [design-guidelines.md](design-guidelines.md). For a live preview see [design-preview.html](design-preview.html).

## Actions

### Button

**Types:** Filled (primary) > Outlined (secondary) > Text.
Height 40px. Label: 14px/600. Sentence case, verb-first.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 text, 3:1 border (outlined) |
| States | Rest, Hover, Pressed, Focus, Disabled |
| Padding | `space-2` vertical, `space-4` horizontal |
| Radius | `radius.md` |

**Do:** Use one Filled button per view for the primary action.
**Don't:** Use "Click here" or end a label with punctuation.

---

### Icon Button

**Types:** Standard (transparent) > Filled (on `primary-container`).
Size 36×36px, icon 20×20px centered.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 3:1 icon vs. background |
| States | Rest, Hover, Pressed, Focus, Disabled |
| Touch/click target | 36×36px min |

**Do:** Always pair with an `aria-label`.
**Don't:** Use for actions that also have a text label nearby — pick one.

---

## Input

### Text Field

**Types:** Outlined (default) > Filled (dense forms).
Height 40px. Label floats above on focus/filled.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 text, 3:1 border |
| States | Rest, Hover, Focus, Error, Disabled |
| Radius | `radius.md` |

**Do:** Show the error message directly beneath the field it belongs to.
**Don't:** Rely on a red border alone to indicate an error — pair it with the message.

---

### Checkbox

18×18px box, `radius.sm`, checkmark fades in on check (short duration).

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 3:1 border vs. background |
| States | Unchecked, Checked, Indeterminate, Disabled |
| Touch/click target | 36×36px min (box + padding) |

**Do:** Make the entire label text clickable, not just the box.
**Don't:** Use for a single standalone yes/no choice — use a Switch instead.

---

## Navigation

### Nav Rail

Persistent left rail at Medium/Expanded layout, collapses to a top bar below 720px. Active item uses `primary-container` background + `on-primary-container` text.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Width | 240px (Expanded), icon-only 72px (Medium) |
| States | Rest, Hover, Active, Focus |

**Do:** Keep the active-item indicator visible even when the rail is icon-only.
**Don't:** Nest more than one level of items in the rail — move deeper hierarchy into the page itself.

---

### Tabs

Underline style, `primary` colored indicator that slides between tabs (short duration).

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 label text |
| States | Rest, Hover, Active, Focus |

**Do:** Keep tab labels to a single word where possible.
**Don't:** Use tabs for more than 5–6 sections — switch to a dropdown or side nav.

---

## Containment

### Card

`surface-variant` background, `radius.md`, `elevation.1` at rest, `elevation.2` on hover if clickable.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Padding | `space-4` |
| States | Rest, Hover (only if interactive) |

**Do:** Use consistent padding across all cards on a page.
**Don't:** Add elevation to a card that isn't visually "above" the page — see design-guidelines.md.

---

### Modal

`elevation.3`, `radius.md`, max-width 480px, centered with a scrim behind it (`on-surface` at 32% opacity).

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 all text |
| States | Entering, Idle, Exiting |
| Motion | Long duration (320ms) enter/exit |

**Do:** Trap focus inside the modal while open and return it to the trigger element on close.
**Don't:** Stack more than one modal at a time.

---

## Data Display

### Data Table

Row height 48px, `outline` colored dividers between rows, `surface-variant` used for alternating stripes on dense tables.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 cell text |
| States | Row rest, Row hover, Row selected |

**Do:** Freeze the header row on scroll for tables longer than one screen.
**Don't:** Truncate a column's content without an accessible way to see the full value (title attribute or expand).

---

### Avatar

Circular (`radius.full`), 32px default, 24px in compact contexts. Falls back to initials on `primary-container` background when no image is available.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 initials vs. fallback background |
| States | N/A (static) |

**Do:** Use initials fallback consistently, not a generic silhouette icon.
**Don't:** Stretch or crop an avatar image out of its aspect ratio.

---

## Feedback

### Toast

Bottom-right, `elevation.2`, auto-dismiss after 5s unless it contains an action, `radius.md`.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 4.5:1 text |
| States | Entering, Idle, Exiting |

**Do:** Allow the user to dismiss a toast manually at any time.
**Don't:** Use a toast for anything requiring a response — use a Modal instead.

---

### Progress Indicator

Linear, 4px height, `primary` fill on `outline` colored track, `radius.full` ends.

| Property | Value |
|---|---|
| Contrast | 3:1 fill vs. track |
| States | Determinate, Indeterminate |

**Do:** Use determinate progress whenever the duration is knowable (file upload).
**Don't:** Leave an indeterminate spinner running past ~10s without additional status text.
